title: 100 Prisoners Problem
hook: Optimal hat-guessing strategy saves most prisoners with high probability.
key_lesson: Collaboration can enhance individual chances of success.

title: AMPS Paradox
hook: Firewall argument from monogamy of entanglement at black hole horizons.
key_lesson: Entanglement challenges our understanding of black holes.

title: Abelson's Paradox
hook: Effect size may not indicate practical meaning.
key_lesson: Effect size does not guarantee practical significance.

title: Abilene Paradox
hook: Group pursues unwanted outcome because all assume others want it.
key_lesson: Assumptions about others' preferences can lead to collective misdecision.

title: Access Paradox
hook: Unconscious justification incompatible with conscious access.
key_lesson: Conscious access can mislead our understanding of justification.

title: Accuracy Paradox
hook: High accuracy classifier performs poorly on imbalanced data.
key_lesson: Accuracy can be misleading in imbalanced datasets.

title: Achilles and Arrow Paradox
hook: Arrow at rest at every instant appears unable to move.
key_lesson: Motion can be counterintuitive.

title: Aharonov-Bohm Effect
hook: Electrons affected by magnetic field where field is zero.
key_lesson: Quantum effects can arise from potentials, not just fields.

title: Alabama Paradox
hook: Increasing the total number of seats can cause a state to lose a seat under some apportionment rules.
key_lesson: Representation can yield counterintuitive results.

title: Albert's Paradox
hook: Supertask convergence depends on time parameterization.
key_lesson: Understanding time's role in infinite processes.

title: Algol Paradox
hook: Binary partners different ages despite same formation.
key_lesson: Age discrepancies in binary stars challenge our understanding.

title: Allais Paradox
hook: Choice patterns over lotteries violate the independence axiom of expected utility theory.
key_lesson: Choices can contradict expected utility theory.

title: Paradox of Analysis
hook: Analyses must be both correct and informative, yet correctness seems to require synonymy.
key_lesson: No analysis can satisfy both correctness and informativeness.

title: Ant on a Rubber Rope
hook: Ant reaches end of stretching rope despite constant speed ratio less than 1.
key_lesson: Infinity can lead to counterintuitive results.

title: Antitrust Paradox
hook: Antitrust enforcement protects inefficient competitors.
key_lesson: Competition can lead to higher prices when mismanaged.

title: Archer's Paradox
hook: Archer aims off-target to hit due to arrow flex.
key_lesson: Aim slightly off to hit the target accurately.

title: Archimedes Paradox
hook: Battleship floats in few liters water via displacement.
key_lesson: Buoyancy allows heavy objects to float.

title: Aristotle’s Wheel Paradox
hook: Two concentric wheels seem to trace equal path lengths despite having different circumferences.
key_lesson: Perception can mislead our understanding of motion.

title: Arrow’s Impossibility Theorem
hook: No rank-order voting system can satisfy a small set of fairness criteria when there are three or more options.
key_lesson: Fairness in voting systems is fundamentally limited.

title: Availability Cascade Paradox
hook: Repeated low-probability warnings create false consensus.
key_lesson: Beware of consensus formed by repeated misinformation.

title: Banach–Tarski Paradox
hook: A solid ball can be partitioned into finitely many pieces and reassembled into two balls of the original size.
key_lesson: Infinity can lead to counterintuitive results.

title: Bose-Einstein Condensate Paradox
hook: Macroscopic quantum wavefunction at near-absolute zero.
key_lesson: Quantum effects can manifest on macroscopic scales.

title: Bell's Spaceship Paradox
hook: Uniformly accelerating spaceships create string-breaking tension.
key_lesson: Acceleration affects the tension in a connecting string.

title: Bellman-Ford Paradox
hook: Optimal policy differs from myopic expected value maximization.
key_lesson: Optimal decisions can contradict short-term gains.

title: Benardete's Paradox
hook: Infinite gods with barriers: no god stops man.
key_lesson: Infinite entities can lead to contradictions.

title: Berkson’s Paradox
hook: Conditioning on a common effect can induce spurious negative correlations.
key_lesson: Correlation does not imply causation.

title: Bernoulli's Paradox
hook: Faster flow implies lower pressure counterintuitive for lift.
key_lesson: Fluid speed and pressure are inversely related.

title: Berry’s Paradox
hook: A number that cannot be named creates a self-referential dilemma.
key_lesson: Self-reference can lead to contradictions.

title: Bertrand’s Paradox (Chord)
hook: Different ‘natural’ procedures for choosing a random chord in a circle yield different probabilities.
key_lesson: Randomness can lead to contradictory results.

title: Bertrand's Ray Paradox
hook: Different ray selection methods from sphere center yield different probabilities.
key_lesson: Selection methods can drastically affect outcomes.

title: Black Hole Information Paradox
hook: Black hole evaporation seems to destroy information, conflicting with quantum unitarity.
key_lesson: Information cannot be destroyed, even by black holes.

title: Bhartrhari Paradox
hook: Things unnameable are named by calling them unnameable.
key_lesson: Naming can paradoxically define the undefinable.

title: Birthday Paradox
hook: In a group of only 23 people there is about a 50% chance that two share a birthday.
key_lesson: Intuition about probability can be misleading.

title: Black Hole Firewall Paradox
hook: Horizon either destroys information (firewall) or violates equivalence principle.
key_lesson: Information preservation challenges our understanding of black holes.

title: Boiling-Freezing Paradox
hook: Water can boil and freeze simultaneously at triple point.
key_lesson: States of matter can coexist under specific conditions.

title: Boltzmann Brain Paradox
hook: Fluctuation brains more likely than ordered observers in thermal equilibrium.
key_lesson: Random fluctuations can lead to improbable events.

title: Bonini's Paradox
hook: More complete models of complex systems become less understandable.
key_lesson: Complexity can hinder understanding.

title: Borda Count Paradox
hook: Rank-order voting vulnerable to strategic misrepresentation of preferences.
key_lesson: Voting systems can lead to unexpected outcomes.

title: Borel's Paradox
hook: Conditional densities on the circle depend on coordinate choice despite rotational invariance.
key_lesson: Coordinate choices affect probability densities.

title: Borel–Kolmogorov Paradox
hook: Conditional probabilities on sets of measure zero depend on the conditioning method.
key_lesson: Conditioning affects probability outcomes.

title: Boxes Paradox
hook: Box and urn setups where conditioning on information reverses naive probability judgments.
key_lesson: Conditioning can alter perceived probabilities.

title: Boy or Girl Paradox
hook: Probability of boy given at least one boy changes based on sampling assumptions.
key_lesson: Conditional probabilities can be counterintuitive.

title: Boyle's Self-Flowing Flask
hook: Flask fills itself but violates perpetual motion ban.
key_lesson: Perpetual motion is impossible due to energy conservation.

title: Braess’s Paradox
hook: Adding a new route to a traffic network can worsen travel times at equilibrium.
key_lesson: More options can lead to worse outcomes.

title: Buffon's Needle Paradox
hook: Needle crossings estimate pi but counterintuitive for small angles.
key_lesson: Randomness can yield precise mathematical constants.

title: Burali–Forti Paradox
hook: The set of all ordinals is an ordinal that does not contain itself.
key_lesson: Self-referential sets can lead to contradictions.

title: Buridan's Ass
hook: Perfectly equal options paralyze rational choice despite clear preferences.
key_lesson: Indecision can arise from equally appealing choices.

title: Cantor's Paradox
hook: The set of all sets has no cardinality because its power set is strictly larger.
key_lesson: There is no greatest cardinal number.

title: Casimir Effect Paradox
hook: Vacuum fluctuations create measurable attractive force between plates.
key_lesson: Quantum fluctuations can have real physical effects.

title: Catch-22 Logic Paradox
hook: Need something only obtainable by not needing it.
key_lesson: Some needs create impossible situations.

title: Centipede Game
hook: Backward induction predicts early termination despite long-term mutual gain.
key_lesson: Rational choices can lead to suboptimal outcomes.

title: Chainstore Paradox
hook: Backward induction unravels cooperation despite reputation concerns.
key_lesson: Reputation does not guarantee cooperation in repeated games.

title: Chinese Room Paradox
hook: Person following Chinese rules lacks understanding despite perfect output.
key_lesson: Syntax does not imply understanding.

title: Coandă Effect Paradox
hook: Fluid streams follow curved surfaces defying straight-line expectation.
key_lesson: Curved paths can influence fluid behavior unexpectedly.

title: Code-Talker Paradox
hook: Language both enables and blocks communication.
key_lesson: Language can simultaneously facilitate and hinder understanding.

title: Coin Rotation Paradox
hook: Coin rotating around identical coin makes full revolution after half circumference.
key_lesson: Understanding motion and rotation can lead to counterintuitive results.

title: Condorcet Paradox
hook: Collective majority preferences can be cyclic even when individual preferences are transitive.
key_lesson: Majority preferences can contradict individual choices.

title: Cool Tropics Paradox
hook: Tropics cooler than models during warm periods.
key_lesson: Proxies can contradict model predictions.

title: Crocodile Dilemma
hook: A crocodile steals a child, promising to return it if the father guesses correctly.
key_lesson: Understanding promises and predictions can lead to paradoxes.

title: Curry’s Paradox
hook: Self-referential conditionals can trivialize certain logical systems, deriving any statement.
key_lesson: Self-reference can lead to contradictions in logic.

title: D’Alembert’s Paradox
hook: Ideal-fluid theory predicts zero drag on certain bodies, contradicting everyday experience.
key_lesson: Real fluids always exhibit drag, unlike ideal models.

title: Deaton Paradox
hook: Consumption smooth despite sharp income variations.
key_lesson: Income fluctuations do not always affect consumption patterns.

title: Delayed Choice Paradox
hook: Future measurement choice affects past particle behavior.
key_lesson: Observation influences reality in quantum mechanics.

title: Diamond Battery Paradox
hook: Carbon-14 diamonds generate electricity for 5700+ years.
key_lesson: Longevity of radioactive materials can be harnessed.

title: Dividend Paradox
hook: Dividend policy seems to influence firm value, contradicting theory.
key_lesson: Real-world factors can contradict theoretical models.

title: Dollar Auction
hook: Bidders escalate beyond rational limits due to sunk costs.
key_lesson: Sunk costs can lead to irrational decision-making.

title: Doomsday Argument
hook: Our birth rank suggests humanity nears end given uniform birth distribution.
key_lesson: Our position in time can skew our perception of future events.

title: Double Negatives Paradox
hook: Phrases with double negatives can express affirmation or nuanced attitudes.
key_lesson: Double negatives can affirm rather than negate.

title: Double Slit Paradox
hook: Particles create interference alone, behave as particles when observed.
key_lesson: Observation affects particle behavior.

title: Drinker Paradox
hook: In any non-empty bar, there is a person such that if that person is drinking, everyone is drinking.
key_lesson: Existence of a drinker implies universal drinking.

title: Earman-Baron Supertask
hook: Infinite process converges differently depending on time parameterization.
key_lesson: Time parameterization affects convergence in infinite processes.

title: Ehrenfest Paradox
hook: Rotating disk in special relativity has circumference contraction but radius dilation.
key_lesson: Relativity challenges our intuitive understanding of geometry.

title: Einstein's Box Paradox
hook: Relativistic energy transfer appears to violate conservation locally.
key_lesson: Energy conservation can seem violated in relativistic contexts.

title: El Farol Bar Paradox
hook: Predicting others' attendance creates self-defeating prophecies.
key_lesson: Overconfidence in predictions can lead to failure.

title: Elevator Weight Paradox
hook: Apparent weight changes in an accelerating elevator can feel paradoxical without Newtonian analysis.
key_lesson: Understanding forces reveals the true nature of weight in acceleration.

title: Elliptic Envelope Paradox
hook: Maxmin expected utility handles ambiguity but leads to over-cautiousness.
key_lesson: Over-cautiousness can hinder optimal decision-making.

title: Ellsberg Paradox
hook: Preferences over ambiguous urns violate expected-utility axioms.
key_lesson: Ambiguity aversion contradicts expected utility theory.

title: Paradox of Entailment
hook: From a contradiction, classical logic derives every statement, making inconsistent theories trivial.
key_lesson: Inconsistent premises yield valid conclusions.

title: Envelope Game Paradox
hook: Sealed bid auction where higher bid wins but pays own bid creates no-trade theorem.
key_lesson: Bidding strategies can lead to paradoxical outcomes.

title: Epistemic Paradoxes General
hook: Infinite regress, circularity, or foundationalism all problematic for knowledge.
key_lesson: Understanding knowledge limits reveals deeper philosophical issues.

title: EPR Paradox
hook: Entangled particles exhibit correlations that challenge classical locality and realism.
key_lesson: Quantum entanglement defies classical intuitions.

title: Equity Premium Puzzle
hook: Observed equity returns appear too high relative to standard risk-aversion calibrations.
key_lesson: High equity returns challenge traditional risk models.

title: Existential Paradox
hook: Radical freedom creates burden of absolute responsibility.
key_lesson: Freedom entails responsibility, leading to existential dilemmas.

title: False Friends Paradox
hook: Similar-looking words across languages can mislead speakers into incorrect interpretations.
key_lesson: Beware of misleading similarities in language.

title: False Positive Paradox
hook: Low-prevalence conditions make positive tests mostly false positives even with good accuracy.
key_lesson: High accuracy doesn't guarantee true positives in low-prevalence scenarios.

title: Feather-Hammer Paradox
hook: Feather and hammer fall together in vacuum, contradicting air intuition.
key_lesson: Gravity affects all objects equally in a vacuum.

title: Feynman Sprinkler
hook: Submerged sprinkler sucking fluid rotation direction.
key_lesson: Fluid dynamics can defy intuitive expectations.

title: Fibonacci Heap Paradox
hook: Worst-case operations amortized to logarithmic despite pathological cases.
key_lesson: Amortized analysis can yield surprising results.

title: Finite Repeated Prisoner's Dilemma
hook: Known finite horizon unravels cooperation backward from last round.
key_lesson: Finite games can lead to non-cooperative outcomes.

title: Fitch’s Knowability Paradox
hook: If all truths are knowable, it appears to follow that all truths are in fact known.
key_lesson: Not all knowable truths are known.

title: Fredkin's Paradox
hook: More similar choices take more decision time.
key_lesson: Similarity can complicate decision-making.

title: Paradox of Free Choice
hook: Disjunction introduction leads to contradictions in free choice scenarios.
key_lesson: Free choice can yield contradictory outcomes.

title: Free Rider Paradox
hook: Individuals benefit from collective goods without contributing, underproviding the good.
key_lesson: Collective action often fails due to individual incentives.

title: Friendship Paradox
hook: Average person's friends have more friends than average.
key_lesson: Your friends likely have more friends than you do.

title: Gabriel’s Horn
hook: A surface of revolution can have finite volume but infinite surface area.
key_lesson: Finite volume does not imply finite surface area.

title: Galileo's Paradox
hook: Infinitely many squares but more non-squares challenges intuitive counting.
key_lesson: Infinity can defy our intuitive understanding of size.

title: Galton Board Paradox
hook: Local randomness produces global bell curve pattern.
key_lesson: Random processes can lead to predictable outcomes.

title: Gettier Paradoxes
hook: Agents can have justified true belief without knowledge in cleverly constructed cases.
key_lesson: Justified true belief does not guarantee knowledge.

title: Gibbs Paradox
hook: Entropy of mixing seems discontinuous between identical and slightly different gases.
key_lesson: Entropy is not always extensive in mixing scenarios.

title: Giffen Paradox
hook: For some inferior goods, demand can rise when price rises because income effects dominate substitution effects.
key_lesson: Higher prices can increase demand for certain goods.

title: Google Interviews Paradox
hook: Probability of being most awake in room of sleep-deprived equals 1/n.
key_lesson: Awareness of group dynamics can skew perceptions of performance.

title: Grandi's Series
hook: The sum 1-1+1-1+... equals 1, 0, or 1/2.
key_lesson: Infinite series can converge to multiple values.

title: Grelling–Nelson Paradox
hook: The predicate ‘heterological’ seems to be heterological if and only if it is not.
key_lesson: Self-reference can lead to contradictory definitions.

title: Grice's Paradox
hook: Conditionals and probabilities more complex than casual reading.
key_lesson: Understanding conditionals requires careful analysis.

title: Grim Reaper Paradox
hook: Infinite grim reapers prevent death yet person survives, challenging supertask convergence.
key_lesson: Infinity can lead to contradictory outcomes.

title: Groupthink Paradox
hook: Group discussion shifts toward extreme rather than moderate positions.
key_lesson: Consensus can lead to poor decision-making.

title: Gyroscope Paradox
hook: Spinning wheel resists tilt and precesses unexpectedly.
key_lesson: Angular momentum leads to counterintuitive behavior.

title: GZK Paradox
hook: High-energy rays violate Greisen-Zatsepin-Kuzmin limit.
key_lesson: High-energy cosmic rays challenge our understanding of physics.

title: Quantum Hardest Problem
hook: Born rule probabilities unexplained in Everettian quantum mechanics.
key_lesson: Understanding quantum mechanics requires reconciling probabilities.

title: Hausdorff Paradox
hook: Sphere can be partitioned into non-measurable sets with paradoxical properties.
key_lesson: Non-measurable sets challenge our understanding of volume.

title: Hawking Radiation Paradox
hook: Virtual particles become real near horizon, causing black hole mass loss.
key_lesson: Black holes can emit radiation and lose mass.

title: Hedgehog's Dilemma
hook: Intimacy requires mutual harm despite goodwill.
key_lesson: Intimacy often involves unavoidable pain.

title: Paradox of Hedonism
hook: Pursuing pleasure directly can lead to misery; indirect pursuit may yield happiness.
key_lesson: Indirect pursuit of happiness is often more effective.

title: Heterological Paradox
hook: Is 'heterological' (true of words not describing themselves) heterological?
key_lesson: Self-reference can lead to contradictory conclusions.

title: Hilbert-Bernays Paradox
hook: A name equals the successor of the number it names.
key_lesson: Names can create misleading identities.

title: Hilbert’s Hotel
hook: An infinite hotel can accommodate additional guests even when fully occupied by rearranging rooms.
key_lesson: Infinity can lead to counterintuitive results.

title: Hindsight Bias Paradox
hook: Post-event probabilities exceed pre-event despite Bayesian updating.
key_lesson: Our memories distort probabilities after events occur.

title: Holographic Principle Paradox
hook: Info proportional to surface area not volume.
key_lesson: Understanding dimensions can reshape our view of reality.

title: Hooper's Paradox
hook: Rearranging pieces preserves area but creates visual volume illusion.
key_lesson: Visual perception can mislead despite mathematical truths.

title: All Horses are the Same Color
hook: Flawed induction 'proves' all horses share one color by overlapping sets.
key_lesson: Induction can lead to incorrect conclusions.

title: Unexpected Hanging Paradox
hook: A predicted surprise event cannot occur on any day, yet it does if unexpected.
key_lesson: Self-reference can create logical contradictions.

title: Hydraulic Jump Paradox
hook: Slow shallow flow jumps to fast deep flow counterintuitively.
key_lesson: Fluid flow can behave unexpectedly under certain conditions.

title: Irresistible Force / Immovable Object
hook: The coexistence of an irresistible force and an immovable object appears logically impossible.
key_lesson: Some paradoxes challenge our understanding of reality.

title: Infinitely Repeated Games Paradox
hook: Discounted infinite horizon sustains cooperation as equilibria.
key_lesson: Cooperation can emerge in repeated interactions.

title: Inspection Paradox
hook: Randomly arriving observers see longer intervals than average interval length.
key_lesson: Random sampling can distort perceived averages.

title: Insurance–Gambling Paradox
hook: People buy insurance and gamble simultaneously, showing risk-averse and risk-seeking behavior.
key_lesson: Risk behavior varies by context.

title: Jevons Paradox
hook: Efficiency improvements can increase total resource use when they lower effective cost and spur demand.
key_lesson: Efficiency can lead to increased consumption.

title: Keynesian Beauty Contest
hook: Success requires predicting others' predictions iteratively.
key_lesson: Anticipating others' choices is crucial for success.

title: Knower Paradox
hook: This sentence is unknown leads to inconsistency.
key_lesson: Knowledge can lead to contradictions.

title: KR Paradox
hook: Knowledge requires justified true belief, but justification loops create regress.
key_lesson: Justification can lead to infinite regress.

title: Kyburg's Lottery Paradox Variant
hook: High probability beliefs cannot be conjoined for acceptance.
key_lesson: High probabilities can mislead acceptance.

title: Ladder Paradox
hook: Ladder fits in shorter barn due to relativity of simultaneity.
key_lesson: Relativity alters our perception of simultaneity.

title: Levitating Water Paradox
hook: Acoustic levitation suspends water droplets defying gravity.
key_lesson: Sound waves can manipulate fluid behavior.

title: Liar Paradox
hook: The sentence ‘This sentence is false’ is true if and only if it is false.
key_lesson: Self-referential statements can create logical contradictions.

title: Liberal Paradox
hook: Minimal individual rights can conflict with Pareto efficiency.
key_lesson: Liberty and efficiency can be at odds.

title: Loschmidt’s Paradox
hook: Microscopic reversibility appears to conflict with macroscopic irreversibility.
key_lesson: Understanding time's arrow in thermodynamics.

title: Lottery Paradox
hook: Rationality requires believing each ticket loses but the conjunction that all lose is improbable.
key_lesson: Probability can mislead rational belief.

title: Lotus Eater Paradox
hook: Pleasure without reality preferred? Challenges hedonism.
key_lesson: Pleasure may not equate to true happiness.

title: Magnus Effect Paradox
hook: Spinning sphere curves trajectory due to pressure differences.
key_lesson: Understanding how spin affects motion.

title: Margolus-Levitin Theorem Paradox
hook: Quantum state change bounded by average energy, counterintuitive for computation.
key_lesson: Energy limits quantum state changes.

title: Mary's Room Paradox
hook: Neuroscientist knowing all physics of color learns new upon seeing red.
key_lesson: Knowledge isn't just physical facts.

title: Matching Pennies Paradox
hook: Pure strategies fail; requires randomization for equilibrium.
key_lesson: Randomization is essential in zero-sum games.

title: Maxwell’s Demon
hook: A hypothetical demon seems able to violate the second law of thermodynamics by sorting molecules.
key_lesson: Information can influence thermodynamic processes.

title: Meno’s Paradox
hook: If one knows what one is looking for inquiry is unnecessary, but without knowledge, inquiry seems impossible.
key_lesson: Knowledge is essential for inquiry, yet inquiry is needed to gain knowledge.

title: Paradox of Millet Grain
hook: Single grain silent, thousand make sound.
key_lesson: Aggregation can lead to unexpected outcomes.

title: Minority Game Paradox
hook: Simple coordination game produces complex market-like dynamics.
key_lesson: Individual choices can lead to collective unpredictability.

title: Missing Square Puzzle
hook: Figures same pieces but different areas due to visual trick.
key_lesson: Visual perception can deceive mathematical reasoning.

title: Monotonicity Criterion Failure
hook: Increasing support for candidate can cause them to lose under some systems.
key_lesson: Support can backfire in certain voting systems.

title: Monty Hall Problem
hook: Switching doors in a game show setup doubles the chance of winning, contrary to many intuitions.
key_lesson: Switching doors increases winning odds.

title: Moore’s Paradox
hook: Statements like ‘It is raining, but I don’t believe it is’ appear absurd though not logically contradictory.
key_lesson: Belief and assertion can diverge in surprising ways.

title: Moral Maze Paradox
hook: Same action judged differently based on causal description.
key_lesson: Judgments can vary based on framing.

title: Moving Rows Paradox
hook: Moving rows pass stationary differently than each other.
key_lesson: Motion is relative and depends on the observer's frame.

title: Mpemba Effect
hook: Under some conditions hot water appears to freeze faster than cold water.
key_lesson: Temperature affects freezing rates in unexpected ways.

title: Münchhausen Trilemma
hook: All justification faces regress, circularity, or axiomatic stopping.
key_lesson: Justification in knowledge is inherently problematic.

title: Necktie Paradox
hook: Wager between two seems to favor both parties.
key_lesson: Wagers can create misleading perceptions of fairness.

title: New Evil Demon Paradox
hook: Demon-induced true beliefs lack justification despite reliability.
key_lesson: Reliability does not guarantee justification.

title: Newcomb’s Problem
hook: One-boxing and two-boxing choices both appear rational under different principles of decision.
key_lesson: Rational choices can lead to conflicting outcomes.

title: Nihilism Paradox
hook: No meaning implies search for meaning is absurd.
key_lesson: Searching for meaning can be inherently absurd.

title: Nikodym Set
hook: Set simultaneously measure-zero and measure-positive in different senses.
key_lesson: Measure can be counterintuitive in certain sets.

title: No Miracles Argument Paradox
hook: Success of science inexplicable without approximate truth.
key_lesson: Scientific success suggests a close relationship to truth.

title: No-No Paradox
hook: The statement 'No one believes no one is infallible' leads to contradictions.
key_lesson: Ambiguities in belief statements can create paradoxes.

title: No-Show Paradox
hook: Voting for candidate can cause loss vs abstaining.
key_lesson: Voting can lead to unintended negative outcomes.

title: Non-Voting Paradox
hook: Abstentions or turnout changes can flip collective outcomes in counterintuitive ways.
key_lesson: Voting dynamics can lead to unexpected results.

title: NPV vs. IRR Paradox
hook: Projects can have conflicting rankings under net present value and internal rate of return criteria.
key_lesson: NPV and IRR can lead to different project decisions.

title: Observer Effect Paradox
hook: Observation alters quantum system state fundamentally.
key_lesson: Observation impacts quantum systems.

title: Olbers’ Paradox
hook: An infinite static universe of stars should produce a bright night sky, not darkness.
key_lesson: The universe's structure affects our perception of the night sky.

title: Omission Bias Paradox
hook: Inaction preferred despite worse expected outcomes compared to action.
key_lesson: Inaction can lead to worse consequences than taking action.

title: Omniscience Paradox
hook: Can an omniscient being know contingent future choices without determining them?
key_lesson: The nature of knowledge and free will is complex.

title: Painlevé Paradox
hook: Rigid dynamics with friction inconsistent.
key_lesson: Friction complicates rigid-body dynamics.

title: Painter’s Paradox
hook: Painting infinitely many stripes or regions in finite area challenges intuition about measure.
key_lesson: Infinity can exist within finite bounds.

title: Paper Balloon Paradox
hook: Light paper balloons can rise in air in ways that seem to contradict simple weight-based expectations.
key_lesson: Buoyancy can defy intuitive weight assumptions.

title: Paradox of Place
hook: Everything existing has place, which has place ad infinitum.
key_lesson: Understanding infinite regress in existence.

title: Paradox of Youth
hook: Overabundance young stars near galactic center black hole.
key_lesson: Observations can challenge established theories.

title: Paradoxical Bargaining
hook: Equal split emerges despite strategic incentives for unequal offers.
key_lesson: Fairness can lead to unexpected outcomes in negotiations.

title: Parrondo’s Paradox
hook: Two losing games can be alternated or mixed to produce a winning outcome.
key_lesson: Combining strategies can yield unexpected results.

title: Pascal's Wager
hook: Infinite reward for belief makes wagering on God rational regardless of probability.
key_lesson: Rationality can lead to belief based on potential infinite outcomes.

title: Pessimistic Meta-Induction
hook: Past successful theories false implies current theories approximate.
key_lesson: Historical theories often fail, questioning current ones.

title: Pigeonhole Principle Paradox
hook: Finite pigeons guarantee collision in fewer holes.
key_lesson: More items than containers ensure overlap.

title: Leaning Tower of Pisa Paradox
hook: Heavier objects fall faster myth debunked by simultaneous drop experiment.
key_lesson: All objects fall at the same rate in a vacuum.

title: Placebo Paradox
hook: Inactive treatment works through belief despite no mechanism.
key_lesson: Belief can influence health outcomes.

title: Pole-Barn Paradox
hook: Fast pole fits in slow barn but doors can't close simultaneously.
key_lesson: Relativity affects measurements of length and time.

title: Pool Table Paradox
hook: Ball stops due to friction despite Newton's first law intuition.
key_lesson: Friction can cause motion to cease contrary to expectations.

title: Population Paradox
hook: A faster-growing state can lose a seat to a slower-growing state under certain apportionment methods.
key_lesson: Growth does not guarantee representation.

title: Preface Paradox
hook: An author believes all claims but also that errors exist.
key_lesson: Belief can coexist with doubt about correctness.

title: Preparedness Paradox
hook: Preparation can reduce perceived catastrophe seriousness.
key_lesson: Preparation can sometimes backfire.

title: Prisoner’s Dilemma
hook: Mutual defection is a dominant-strategy equilibrium but yields worse payoffs than mutual cooperation.
key_lesson: Cooperation can lead to better outcomes than self-interest.

title: Proebsting's Paradox
hook: Hedging with options can reverse risk attitudes compared to underlying bets.
key_lesson: Risk management strategies can backfire unexpectedly.

title: Prosecutor’s Fallacy
hook: Confusing the probability of evidence given innocence with the probability of innocence given evidence.
key_lesson: Probability must be interpreted correctly to avoid fallacies.

title: Pygmalion Paradox
hook: Higher expectations create better performance, self-fulfilling.
key_lesson: Expectations can shape outcomes significantly.

title: Pyrrhonian Skepticism Paradox
hook: Suspension of belief justified by reasons undercuts justification.
key_lesson: Skepticism can undermine its own justification.

title: Rabin Paradox
hook: Observed risk aversion for small stakes implies absurd behavior for large stakes.
key_lesson: Risk aversion can lead to irrational decisions.

title: Paradox of the Ravens
hook: Observing a non-black non-raven appears to confirm ‘All ravens are black.’
key_lesson: Evidence can mislead our understanding of generalizations.

title: Relevance Paradox
hook: Relevant info not sought until relevance clear.
key_lesson: Relevance can only be assessed post-information acquisition.

title: Repugnant Conclusion Paradox
hook: Total utilitarianism implies barely worth living lives preferable to quality.
key_lesson: Quality of life can be overshadowed by sheer quantity.

title: Revenge Liar Paradox
hook: Even after assigning truth predicates to levels, a new liar sentence at the next level arises.
key_lesson: Truth predicates can lead to infinite regress.

title: Richard's Paradox
hook: A real number defined in finite English words is claimed undefinable, contradicting arithmetic.
key_lesson: Definability can lead to contradictions in arithmetic.

title: Rock-Paper-Scissors Paradox
hook: Cyclic dominance requires mixed strategy equilibrium.
key_lesson: Mixed strategies can lead to unexpected outcomes.

title: Relativistic Rocket Paradox
hook: Constant proper acceleration yields hyperbolic motion trajectory.
key_lesson: Acceleration affects time perception in relativity.

title: Ross Paradox
hook: Disjunction introduction permits arbitrary imperatives from conditionals.
key_lesson: Conditionals can lead to unexpected imperatives.

title: Ross-Littlewood Paradox
hook: Infinite ball-adding/removal leaves empty vase despite net addition.
key_lesson: Infinity can lead to counterintuitive results.

title: Rule-Following Paradox
hook: No fact about past behavior determines uniquely how to follow a rule like 'plus'.
key_lesson: Rules do not uniquely determine actions.

title: Russell’s Paradox
hook: The set of all sets that do not contain themselves leads to contradiction in naive set theory.
key_lesson: Self-reference can lead to logical contradictions.

title: Satisfaction Paradox
hook: A self-referential definability issue in logic.
key_lesson: Self-reference can lead to definitional contradictions.

title: Savage's Paradox
hook: Dutch book arguments force subjective probabilities matching objective frequencies.
key_lesson: Subjective probabilities must align with objective frequencies.

title: Schrödinger's Cat
hook: Cat in superposition of alive/dead challenges quantum-classical boundary.
key_lesson: Observation affects quantum states.

title: Secretary Problem Paradox
hook: Optimal strategy rejects first 37% then takes first better candidate, counterintuitive.
key_lesson: Optimal stopping can yield surprising results.

title: Self-Absorption Paradox
hook: Expected utility calculations become circular when agent models their own deliberation.
key_lesson: Self-awareness can lead to conflicting outcomes in decision-making.

title: Self-Defeating Belief Paradox
hook: Beliefs whose content contradicts their rational holding.
key_lesson: Not all beliefs can be rationally held.

title: Simpson’s Paradox
hook: A trend present in multiple groups can reverse when the groups are combined.
key_lesson: Aggregation can obscure true relationships.

title: Simpson's Paradox in Decisions
hook: Optimal subgroup choices aggregate to suboptimal overall.
key_lesson: Aggregate data can mislead decision-making.

title: Simulacra and Simulation Paradox
hook: Representations replace reality until no distinction remains.
key_lesson: Reality can be obscured by its representations.

title: Sisyphus Happiness Paradox
hook: Happiness possible despite eternal futile labor.
key_lesson: Finding joy in struggle can lead to fulfillment.

title: Skolem's Paradox
hook: Uncountable sets have countable models, challenging the absoluteness of countability.
key_lesson: Countability is not absolute in set theory.

title: Sleeper Paradox
hook: Optimal betting strategy differs from credence due to repeated awakenings.
key_lesson: Awareness of repeated sampling impacts decision-making.

title: Sleeping Beauty Problem
hook: Different updating rules yield conflicting credences for a repeated-awakening experiment.
key_lesson: Credence updates depend on the interpretation of the experiment.

title: Quarterer Position
hook: Extreme position claiming 1/4 credence in Sleeping Beauty experiment.
key_lesson: Credence can be counterintuitive in self-locating beliefs.

title: Thirders in Sleeping Beauty
hook: Debate between halfers and thirders on credence upon awakening.
key_lesson: Understanding self-locating beliefs impacts decision-making.

title: Smale's Paradox
hook: Sphere turned inside out topologically without tearing.
key_lesson: Topological properties can defy intuitive understanding.

title: Social Loafing Paradox
hook: Individuals exert less effort in groups despite shared responsibility.
key_lesson: Group settings can reduce individual motivation.

title: Socratic Paradox
hook: Claims like ‘I know that I know nothing’ appear self-undermining yet express a coherent stance on knowledge limits.
key_lesson: Understanding knowledge limits can enhance critical thinking.

title: Sorites Paradox
hook: Small changes seem unable to transform a heap into a non-heap, yet repeated small changes do so.
key_lesson: Small changes can lead to significant transformations.

title: Spectrum Argument
hook: Continuous color change creates Sorites paradox for boundaries.
key_lesson: Vagueness can lead to paradoxical conclusions.

title: Spoiler Effect
hook: Third candidate splits vote causing preferred candidate to lose.
key_lesson: Vote splitting can lead to unintended outcomes.

title: St. Petersburg Paradox
hook: A game with infinite expected value elicits only modest real-world willingness to pay.
key_lesson: Real-world decisions often contradict theoretical expectations.

title: St. Petersburg Paradox Resolutions
hook: Logarithmic utility or probability adjustments resolve infinite expectation.
key_lesson: Utility can be bounded to resolve paradoxes.

title: Stadium Paradox
hook: Zeno's argument about bodies passing each other in stadium.
key_lesson: Motion can be counterintuitive.

title: Standing Wave Paradox
hook: Stationary pattern emerges from moving wave superposition.
key_lesson: Motion can create stationary patterns.

title: Stapp's Paradox
hook: Quantum measurement requires conscious observer creating observer-dependence.
key_lesson: Observation influences quantum outcomes.

title: Strengthened Liar Paradox
hook: This sentence is not true challenges traditional truth definitions.
key_lesson: Truth can be more complex than binary definitions.

title: Superdeterminism Paradox
hook: Correlations explained by predetermined measurement choices.
key_lesson: Measurement choices can influence outcomes.

title: Superfluid Paradox
hook: Liquid helium flows without viscosity defying classical friction.
key_lesson: Superfluidity challenges classical physics concepts.

title: Swampman Paradox
hook: Lightning-created duplicate lacks intentional states despite identical behavior.
key_lesson: Identity does not guarantee intentionality.

title: Tachyonic Antitelephone
hook: Faster-than-light signaling enables sending messages to past.
key_lesson: Causality can be violated with faster-than-light communication.

title: Tea Leaves Paradox
hook: Tea leaves collect in the center of a stirred cup despite naive centrifugal expectations.
key_lesson: Intuitive expectations can be misleading in fluid dynamics.

title: Teletransporter Paradox
hook: Body destroyed and rebuilt elsewhere: is it you or copy?
key_lesson: Identity may not survive physical duplication.

title: Temperature Paradox
hook: Temperature is 90 and rising seems to imply 90 is rising.
key_lesson: Understanding predication is crucial in logic.

title: Tensegrity Paradox
hook: Floating compression members appear structurally impossible.
key_lesson: Stability can arise from seemingly contradictory structures.

title: Ship of Theseus
hook: A ship gradually replaced plank by plank raises questions about numerical identity over time.
key_lesson: Identity can be complex and context-dependent.

title: Thomson’s Lamp
hook: A lamp toggled infinitely many times in finite time raises the question of its final state.
key_lesson: Infinite processes can lead to paradoxical conclusions.

title: Three Cards Problem
hook: Determining card underside color from random draw.
key_lesson: Conditional probability can lead to counterintuitive results.

title: Three Prisoners Problem
hook: Warden's statement changes survival probabilities counterintuitively.
key_lesson: Conditional probabilities can defy intuition.

title: Paradox of Thrift
hook: Saving more individually can harm the economy's overall savings.
key_lesson: Aggregate behavior can contradict individual intentions.

title: Time Crystal Paradox
hook: Spontaneous time-translation symmetry breaking without energy input.
key_lesson: Time crystals challenge our understanding of energy and motion.

title: Paradox of Tomorrow
hook: Future events neither true nor false yet appear determinable.
key_lesson: Future events can be uncertain and yet seem predictable.

title: Tragedy of the Commons
hook: Individually rational resource use leads to collective ruin.
key_lesson: Collective action problems can lead to resource depletion.

title: Traveler's Dilemma
hook: Rational play predicts lowest payoffs despite mutual benefit from higher choices.
key_lesson: Cooperation can lead to better outcomes than rational self-interest.

title: Trolley Problem
hook: Trading one life for many yields conflicting judgments across different intervention variants.
key_lesson: Moral dilemmas reveal deep ethical conflicts.

title: Trouton–Noble Paradox
hook: Charged capacitor should experience torque when moving but doesn't.
key_lesson: Motion does not always produce expected forces.

title: Twin Paradox
hook: A traveling twin ages less than a stay-at-home twin in special relativity.
key_lesson: Time dilation leads to differing aging rates.

title: Two-Envelope Paradox
hook: Naive expected-value reasoning suggests always switching envelopes, leading to apparent inconsistency.
key_lesson: Expected value can be misleading in decision-making.

title: Variant Two-Envelope Paradoxes
hook: Explore the infinite descent in envelope switching with self-referential amounts.
key_lesson: Self-reference can lead to paradoxical reasoning.

title: Ultimatum Game Paradox
hook: Subgame-perfect equilibrium predicts acceptance of any positive offer, yet low offers are routinely rejected.
key_lesson: Rationality in decision-making can lead to unexpected outcomes.

title: Uncertainty Principle Paradox
hook: Precision in position destroys momentum knowledge.
key_lesson: Measurement affects the system being measured.

title: Utility Monster Paradox
hook: Can one person's extreme happiness justify taking from others?
key_lesson: Extreme utility for one can lead to unfair resource distribution.

title: Validity Paradox
hook: Valid arguments preserve truth, but soundness requires checking premises.
key_lesson: Soundness requires more than validity.

title: Venturi Paradox
hook: Narrowing pipe increases speed, decreases pressure unexpectedly.
key_lesson: Fluid behavior defies intuitive expectations.

title: Volunteer's Dilemma
hook: Someone must act for group benefit but all prefer inaction.
key_lesson: Collective action often requires individual sacrifice.

title: General Voting Paradoxes
hook: Voting rules can lead to surprising and counterintuitive outcomes.
key_lesson: Voting systems can produce unexpected results.

title: Wang's Paradox
hook: Vague predicates like 'heap' lead to contradictions when considering boundary cases.
key_lesson: Vagueness can create logical inconsistencies.

title: Which-Way Paradox
hook: Path information destroys interference pattern.
key_lesson: Observation affects quantum systems.

title: Wigner's Friend Paradox
hook: Friend measures outcome while Wigner sees superposition of friend+system.
key_lesson: Measurement affects reality in quantum mechanics.

title: Will Rogers Phenomenon
hook: Moving an element from one group to another can increase both group averages.
key_lesson: Averages can be misleading when groups are combined.

title: Willpower Paradox
hook: Open minds more goal-directed than self-declared objectives.
key_lesson: Open-mindedness enhances motivation and goal achievement.

title: Wirehead Paradox
hook: Direct reward stimulation preferred over goal achievement.
key_lesson: Pursuing direct rewards can undermine long-term goals.

title: Yablo's Paradox
hook: An infinite sequence of sentences leads to a contradiction without self-reference.
key_lesson: Infinite sequences can create paradoxes without self-reference.

title: Zeno’s Paradoxes
hook: Zeno's arguments suggest motion is impossible due to infinite steps.
key_lesson: Infinity complicates our understanding of motion.

title: Philosophical Zombie Paradox
hook: Conceivable beings physically identical but unconscious challenge physicalism.
key_lesson: Consciousness may not be fully explained by physical processes.
